title: Market Brief — Monday, May 18, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit in oversupply at 85% availability, H100s are loose at 70%, and MI300X is comfortable at 60%, but B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s are in severe shortage at 10% with no transparent pricing yet. The biggest price signal is H200 OCPI at $7.01/hr versus $3.00 spot median, a 134% premium on trade-settled contracts with 121.7% annualized volatility, screaming that next-gen capacity is being hoarded.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit in oversupply at 85% availability, H100s are loose at 70%, and MI300X is comfortable at 60%, but B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s are in severe shortage at 10% with no transparent pricing yet. The biggest price signal is H200 OCPI at $7.01/hr versus $3.00 spot median, a 134% premium on trade-settled contracts with 121.7% annualized volatility, screaming that next-gen capacity is being hoarded.

On B200 hardware at TCO-adjusted cost of $5.03/M tokens, medium-tier inference providers are selling Llama 70B at a loss of roughly $2.03/M tokens, while premium tiers clear 91% margins. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output is aggressively burning cash against any self-hosted baseline, grade: Burning Cash. OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M output prints money at every tier, grade: Strong. Anthropic Opus 4.6 at $25/M output is well-margined, grade: Strong. Google at $10/M on 2.5 Pro is Neutral.

B200 and GB200 compute is undervalued given 25% and 10% availability respectively, with utilization trending up 5.6pp in 30 days — lock in forward capacity now. A100s at 85% availability and $0.90/hr spot are oversupplied legacy iron; sell or redeploy any long A100 positions into B200 allocations before scarcity pricing fully loads.
bullets: 25% availability on B200s signals scarce compute with spot already at $4.20/hr.
10% availability on GB200s marks a severe shortage with no published spot median.
0.378 cents per million output tokens makes DeepSeek V3.2 the cheapest model tracked, likely below breakeven.
$7.01/hr OCPI on H200 represents a 134% premium over the $3.00 spot median.
90.3% utilization on H100s jumped 10.5 percentage points in 30 days, the largest cluster tightening on the board.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
